text:
Market today: Inflation fears are back in focus, pushing rate hike talk. This is the main driver for tech/chip names, which is most of your book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (-35.39%) and SPAL is a TRIM (-34.57%). Both are leveraged and decay, making them risky on margin.

Watch: NVDA's scanner setup looks solid, but needs to confirm entry. Keep an eye on the inflation news.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged losers and watch inflation data closely.
plays: SOXL: TRIM or SELL - leveraged decay and current losses warrant reducing exposure.
SPAL: TRIM or SELL - similar to SOXL, manage this leveraged position.
NVDA: WATCH scanner entry 203.97-203.76, stop 203.14. High score setup, but wait for confirmation.
